Elementos/marker/markerHeight.name: markerHeight
Elementos/marker/markerHeight.description: This attribute defines the height of the marker viewport.Value type:<length>;Default value:3;Animatable:yes

info.excerpt: This attribute defines the height of the marker viewport.Value type:<length>;Default value:3;Animatable:yes

Elementos/marker/markerUnits.name: markerUnits
Elementos/marker/markerUnits.description: This attribute defines the coordinate system for the attributesmarkerWidth,markerHeightand the contents of the<marker>.Value type:userSpaceOnUse|strokeWidth;Default value:strokeWidth;Animatable:yes

info.excerpt: This attribute defines the coordinate system for the attributesmarkerWidth,markerHeightand the contents of the<marker>.Value type:userSpaceOnUse|strokeWidth;Default value:strokeWidth;Animatable:yes

Elementos/marker/markerWidth.name: markerWidth
Elementos/marker/markerWidth.description: This attribute defines the width of the marker viewport.Value type:<length>;Default value:3;Animatable:yes

info.excerpt: This attribute defines the width of the marker viewport.Value type:<length>;Default value:3;Animatable:yes

Elementos/mask/mask-type.name: mask-type
Elementos/mask/mask-type.description: This attribute defines the mask mode for the contents for the contents of the<mask>.Value type:alpha|luminance;Default value:luminance;Animatable:yes

info.excerpt: This attribute defines the mask mode for the contents for the contents of the<mask>.Value type:alpha|luminance;Default value:luminance;Animatable:yes

Elementos/mask/maskContentUnits.name: maskContentUnits
Elementos/mask/maskContentUnits.description: This attribute defines the coordinate system for the contents of the<mask>.Value type:userSpaceOnUse|objectBoundingBox;Default value:userSpaceOnUse;Animatable:yes

info.excerpt: This attribute defines the coordinate system for the contents of the<mask>.Value type:userSpaceOnUse|objectBoundingBox;Default value:userSpaceOnUse;Animatable:yes

Elementos/mask/maskUnits.name: maskUnits
Elementos/mask/maskUnits.description: This attribute defines the coordinate system for attributesx,y,widthandheighton the<mask>.Value type:userSpaceOnUse|objectBoundingBox;Default value:objectBoundingBox;Animatable:yes

Elementos/style/media.name: media
Elementos/style/media.description: This attribute defines to whichmediathe style applies.Value type:<media-query-list>;Default value:all;Animatable:no

info.excerpt: This attribute defines to whichmediathe style applies.Value type:<media-query-list>;Default value:all;Animatable:no

Elementos/textPath/method.name: method
Elementos/textPath/method.description: Which method to render individual glyphs along the path.Value type:align|stretch;Default value:align;Animatable:yes

info.excerpt: Which method to render individual glyphs along the path.Value type:align|stretch;Default value:align;Animatable:yes

Elementos/marker.name: marker
Elementos/marker.description: The<marker>SVGelement defines a graphic used for drawing arrowheads or polymarkers on a given<path>,<line>,<polyline>or<polygon>element.

info.excerpt: The<marker>SVGelement defines a graphic used for drawing arrowheads or polymarkers on a given<path>,<line>,<polyline>or<polygon>element.

Elementos/mask.name: mask
Elementos/mask.description: The<mask>SVGelement defines a mask for compositing the current object into the background. A mask is used/referenced using themaskproperty and CSSmask-imageproperty.

info.excerpt: The<mask>SVGelement defines a mask for compositing the current object into the background. A mask is used/referenced using themaskproperty and CSSmask-imageproperty.

Elementos/metadata.name: metadata
Elementos/metadata.description: The<metadata>SVGelement adds metadata to SVG content. Metadata is structured information about data. The contents of<metadata>should be elements from otherXMLnamespacessuch asRDF,FOAF, etc.

info.excerpt: The<metadata>SVGelement adds metadata to SVG content. Metadata is structured information about data. The contents of<metadata>should be elements from otherXMLnamespacessuch asRDF,FOAF, etc.

Elementos/mpath.name: mpath
Elementos/mpath.description: The<mpath>SVGsub-element for the<animateMotion>element provides the ability to reference an external<path>element as the definition of a motion path.

info.excerpt: The<mpath>SVGsub-element for the<animateMotion>element provides the ability to reference an external<path>element as the definition of a motion path.
